title: Investigate Perl/Ruby parser wrong-root production (hidden non-terminal as root)
description:
12 test failures show hidden internal names (_qq_string_content, _q_string_content, _heredoc_delimiter, etc.) as root production instead of source_file/module/program. Reviewer analysis shows these are parser/external scanner interaction issues, not display problems — the parser takes incorrect reduction paths ending at hidden non-terminal roots.

Affected: Perl (8), Ruby (3), Python (1)

Root cause investigation needed:
- Perl external scanner string_content token production causing wrong reductions
- Ruby heredoc scanner interactions
- Python indent/dedent scanner interactions

Separate from qkj (NonTerminalAliasMap) which handles correct-parse-wrong-display cases.
